steps.intent: App opens on Planner; default config shows Llama-3.1-8B at 4096 tokens, memory bar half-full.
User clicks 'Load fixture...' in toolbar; dropdown lists 4 fixtures; cursor hovers 'DeepSeek-V3 @ 32k / 8 users'.
Fixture loads: seq-len slider jumps to 32768, users slider to 8, stacked bar recomputes showing 71.4 GB VRAM total.
User clicks 'Export' button; menu slides down with options 'vLLM flags', 'llama.cpp args', 'MLX JSON', 'TorchServe'.
Cursor hits 'vLLM flags'; menu collapses, modal sheet begins sliding up from bottom of the detail pane.
Modal shows monospaced flag string: --model deepseek-v3 --max-model-len 32768 --max-num-seqs 8 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.92 --dtype bf16 ...
Cursor clicks 'Copy' on the modal; button goes green-checked, haptic-style pulse animates outward.
Toast 'Copied vLLM flags (148 chars)' slides up bottom-center; flag string still visible behind it, modal stays open.
